calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wesley Garcia for and with Elizabeth Chong. (Petitioner).

The Court stated that title was held different and questions whether there is sufficient support for the transmutation. Mr. Garcia stated that he has a declaration from Ms. Chong and William Doyle that affirm transmutation took place in 1983, that the writing requirement did not come in until 1985, that the Sister is the only potential heir, and that she has never come to Court and has never had a problem with this transmutation. The Amended Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Continued To Oct-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wesley Garcia for and with Elizabeth Wong (Petitioner).

Mr. Garcia stated that he wants a continuance so that he can file amended petition and give notice of it, and that authority regarding characterization of the separate property that was used for the down payment as community property, as well as the second page of the deed is included in the amended petition. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to October 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
